agreement_points: Both judges found at least some review-worthy concerns.
disagreement_points: Judge 1 assigns Medium while Judge 2 assigns Low.
Judge 1 and Judge 2 emphasize different risk clusters.
The two judges differ materially on severity by 45 risk-score points.
arbitration_notes: Judge 1's evaluator findings carry strong weight because they cover both benchmark and adversarial test readiness.
The reconciled score is biased toward the higher score to avoid understating unresolved safety or compliance concerns.
recommended_action: Proceed only with documented conditions and explicit review of the judge disagreements.
